zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Choke於大約1420年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特斯坦頓 德魯時，他的父親John Choke42歲，母親Mrs. John Choke35歲。他於大約1460年與Margaret Morres結婚。他去世於1483年7月5日在英國薩默塞特朗 艾希頓享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特朗 艾希頓。

nameMeanings.name: Choke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Brendan, Fergus, Kieran.

English (Lancashire) and Irish (Cork): variant of Crook . According to Woulfe, the English name was taken to Ireland in the 13th century; the Croke family settled in Kilkenny, Tipperary, and Cork, whilst Crooke represents a later immigration and is more widespread.
Americanized form of Polish   Krok   and German   Krock   or some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Crook
meanings: topographic name from Old Norse krókr ‘nook or bend’ denoting someone who lived by a bend in a river or road. In some instances the surname may have arisen as a habitational name from any of the places called Crook in Cumberland and Durham, or Crooke in Lancashire, all of which are derived from this word.

topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) barrow or mound’ from Brittonic crüg. In some instances this may have arisen as a habitational name from either Crook in Combe Raleigh or perhaps Crooke in North Tawton (both Devon), which are derived from this word.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Choke was born about 1420, in Stanton Drew, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Choke, was 42 and his mother, Mrs. John Choke, was 35. He married Margaret Morres about 1460. He died on 5 July 1483, in Long Ashton, Somerset, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Long Ashton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Choke est né environ 1420, à Stanton Drew, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Choke, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Choke, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Morres environ 1460. Il est décédé le 5 juillet 1483, à Long Ashton, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Long Ashton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Chokeが約1420年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトスタントン ドリューで生まれた時，父John Chokeは42歳，母Mrs. John Chokeは35歳であった。約1460年にMargaret Morresと結婚した。彼は1483年7月5日にイギリスソメルセトロング アシュトンで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトロング アシュトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Choke(이)가 대략 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 스탠턴 드루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Choke(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John Choke(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1460년 Margaret Morres(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1483년 7월 5일 영국 서머세트 론그 애슈턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 론그 애슈턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Choke родился около 1420 г. в местности стантон дрю, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Choke было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Choke, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Morres около 1460 г. Он умер 5 июля 1483 г. в местности лонг аштон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности лонг аштон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
